review.comment: “I enjoyed my tour in Turkmenistan very well organised. I appreciated very much Merdan our guide so professional, patient and kind. I thanks Yola Rowan for the great opportunity it gives to a single traveller to book a tour, guaranteeing the departure of the tour at a fixed fare rate, even if no other people join the group.”

“Yola Rowana organized an incredible 5-country Central Asia tour for my group. They did a spectacular job, from early communication and throughout the entire journey. We truly had the best experience because of the expertise of Yola Rowana. I recommend them highly!”
“We had the opportunity to be guests with this excellent tour company. Our 10 days from 20th December till 30th December 2025 was indeed and truly educational and enjoyable trip.”
